---
title: "Treebuilding"
author: "Srishti Arya"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
---

# Setup
```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
library(forcats)
library(Biostrings)
library(taxonomizr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtree)
library(treeio)
library(tidytree)
library(patchwork)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
options(scipen = 999)

plate_map <- c(
  BW_1    = "BWplate1",
  BW_2    = "BWplate2",
  BW_3    = "BWplate3",
  Lakes_1 = "day1",
  Lakes_2 = "day2",
  Lakes_3 = "day3"
)

blast_best_contigs_results <- "~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-QueenMary,UniversityofLondon/SrishtiArya_AllWork/Projects/local_R/ORC_barcoding_analysis/DK_amplicon_blasting/all_DK_BW_blast_final.csv"
taxonomizr_sql   <- '../../../accessionTaxa.sql'
```

# Helper functions
```{r functions}
# load and filter BLAST results for a given taxon + barcode
load_blast <- function(taxon, barcode) {
  read_csv(blast_best_contigs_results) %>%
    filter(expected_taxon == taxon & barcode == !!barcode) %>%
    mutate(
      dataset_mapped = plate_map[plate],
      label          = paste(new_code, sample, dataset_mapped, sep = "_")
    )
}

# build metadata table: taxonomy lookup + label cleaning
build_meta <- function(meta_path, blast_df, extra_mutate = NULL) {
  meta <- read_csv(meta_path) %>%
    dplyr::select(label, type) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      original_label      = label,
      label_clean         = label,
      accession_noversion = ifelse(type == "anchor", sub("\\..*", "", label), NA_character_),
      taxid               = ifelse(
        type == "anchor",
        accessionToTaxa(accession_noversion, taxonomizr_sql, version = "base"),
        NA_integer_
      )
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      getTaxonomy(.$taxid[!is.na(.$taxid)], taxonomizr_sql, version = "base") %>%
        as.data.frame() %>%
        rownames_to_column(var = "taxid") %>%
        mutate(taxid = as.integer(str_extract(taxid, "\\d+"))),
      by = "taxid", multiple = "first"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      adapter        = str_extract(label, "SP27_\\d+_SP5_\\d+"),
      dataset_suffix = str_extract(label, "(BWplate\\d+|day\\d+)")
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      blast_df %>% distinct(sample, dataset_mapped, .keep_all = TRUE),
      by = c("adapter" = "sample", "dataset_suffix" = "dataset_mapped")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::rename(label = label.x) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      label_clean = case_when(
        type == "sample" ~ label %>%
          gsub("day(\\d+)", "Lakes\\1", .) %>%
          gsub("BWplate(\\d+)", "Gardens\\1", .),
        type == "anchor" & !is.na(species) ~ paste(accession_noversion, species, sep = " "),
        type == "anchor"                   ~ accession_noversion,
        TRUE                               ~ label
      ),
      dataset = case_when(
        type == "anchor"                                 ~ "anchor",
        type == "sample" & grepl("Garden", label_clean) ~ "Gardens",
        type == "sample"                                 ~ "Lakes",
        TRUE                                             ~ NA_character_
      )
    )

  # apply any taxon-specific extra mutations (e.g. clade column for Platy)
  if (!is.null(extra_mutate)) meta <- extra_mutate(meta)

  meta
}

# build tip label remapping (primary + fallback accession maps)
build_label_map <- function(meta) {
  map1 <- setNames(meta$label_clean, meta$original_label)
  map2 <- setNames(meta$label_clean, meta$accession_noversion)
  map3 <- setNames(meta$label_clean, paste0(meta$accession_noversion, ".1"))
  c(map1,
    map2[!names(map2) %in% names(map1)],
    map3[!names(map3) %in% names(map1)])
}

# root, relabel, and scale a tree
prepare_tree <- function(tree, outgroup, label_map, scale_factor = 0.0005) {
  rooted             <- ape::root(tree, outgroup = outgroup, resolve.root = TRUE)
  rooted$tip.label   <- unname(label_map[rooted$tip.label])
  rooted$node.label  <- NULL
  rooted$edge.length <- rooted$edge.length * scale_factor
  rooted
}

# get MRCA node for each clade from anchor tips
get_clade_nodes <- function(meta, tree, group_var = "order", clade_col = "clade") {
  meta %>%
    filter(type == "anchor", !is.na(.data[[group_var]])) %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(group_var))) %>%
    summarise(
      tips = list(unique(label_clean[label_clean %in% tree$tip.label])),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(node = sapply(tips, function(t) {
      t <- unique(unlist(t))
      if (length(t) >= 2) ape::getMRCA(tree, t) else NA_integer_
    })) %>%
    filter(!is.na(node)) %>%
    dplyr::rename(clade = all_of(group_var))
}

# build node_data tibble (clade assignments + metadata join)
build_node_data <- function(tree, clade_nodes, meta) {
  tree_tbl   <- tidytree::as_tibble(tree)
  node_clade <- rep(NA_character_, max(tree$edge))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(clade_nodes))) {
    desc             <- c(clade_nodes$node[i],
                          tidytree::offspring(tree_tbl, clade_nodes$node[i])$node)
    node_clade[desc] <- clade_nodes$clade[i]
  }

  tree_tbl %>%
    dplyr::mutate(clade = ifelse(is.na(node_clade[node]), "other", node_clade[node])) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(meta, by = c("label" = "label_clean"))
}

# build the ggtree plot
plot_tree <- function(tree, node_data, clade_nodes) {
  ggtree(tree, colour = "black", size = 0.5) %<+% node_data +
    geom_tiplab(aes(colour = dataset), size = 1) +
    scale_colour_manual(
      values   = c(anchor = "grey30", Lakes = "deepskyblue3", Gardens = "darkolivegreen4"),
      na.value = "grey80",
      name     = "Dataset"
    ) +
    geom_cladelab(
      data        = clade_nodes,
      mapping     = aes(node = node, label = clade),
      fontsize    = 1,
      fontface    = "italic",
      offset.text = 0.000075,
      align       = TRUE,
      barsize     = 0,
      barcolour   = NA
    ) +
    geom_treescale(fontsize = 0.5, linesize = 0.5, offset = -1.5) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}
```

# Nematoda 18S
```{r nem_18S}
nem_blast_18S <- load_blast("Nematoda", "18S")

nem_meta_18S <- build_meta("../../../trees/Nematoda_18S/Nematoda_18S_metadata.csv",
                           nem_blast_18S)

nem_18S_raw  <- ggtree::read.tree("../../../trees/Nematoda_18S/iqtree/custom_Nematoda_18S.treefile")

# root on Enoplida using original labels
enoplida_tips <- nem_meta_18S %>%
  filter(order == "Enoplida") %>%
  pull(original_label) %>%
  intersect(nem_18S_raw$tip.label)

nem_18S_tree_rooted <- prepare_tree(nem_18S_raw, enoplida_tips, build_label_map(nem_meta_18S))

nem_clade_nodes_18S <- get_clade_nodes(nem_meta_18S, nem_18S_tree_rooted, group_var = "order")
nem_node_data_18S   <- build_node_data(nem_18S_tree_rooted, nem_clade_nodes_18S, nem_meta_18S)
nem_18S_plot        <- plot_tree(nem_18S_tree_rooted, nem_node_data_18S, nem_clade_nodes_18S)

nem_18S_plot
```

# Platyhelminthes 28S
```{r platy_28S}
platy_blast_28S <- load_blast("Platyhelminthes", "28S")

platy_meta_28S <- build_meta(
  "../../../trees/Platyhelminthes_28S/manual_test/tip_metadata.csv",
  platy_blast_28S,
  extra_mutate = function(m) mutate(m, clade = case_when(
    family %in% c("Catenulidae", "Stenostomidae") ~ "Catenulida",
    TRUE ~ order
  ))
)

platy_28S_raw <- ggtree::read.tree("../../../trees/Platyhelminthes_28S/manual_test/realigned/platyhelminthes_28S.treefile")

tips_to_drop <- c(
  "AJ228800.1_1312376_AJ228800.1_Kronborgia_isopodicola_partial_28S_rRNA_gene_668",
  "LC512875.1_6169_LC512875.1_Cheliplana_sp._2_NJ_2019_gene_for_28S_ribosomal_RNA__partial_sequence_536",
  "KM588103.1_27901_KM588103.1_Diceratocephala_boschmai_voucher_SWU51410_28S_ribosomal_RNA_gene__partial_sequence_550",
  "KC869885.1_27901_KC869885.1_Bresslauilla_relicta_28S_ribosomal_RNA_genes__partial_sequence_2103",
  "AJ313232.1_27901_AJ313232.1_Graffilla_buccinicola_partial_28S_rRNA_gene_1250",
  "KC529640.1_27901_KC529640.1_Solenopharyngidae_sp._NVS_2013_isolate_UH356.2_28S_ribosomal_RNA_gene__partial_sequence_1634",
  "AF022754.1_27901_AF022754.1_Provortex_psammophilus_28S_ribosomal_RNA_gene__partial_sequence_828",
  "KC529544.1_27901_KC529544.1_Trigonostomum_setigerum_isolate_UH330.9_28S_ribosomal_RNA_gene__partial_sequence_1696",
  "AJ315645.1_27901_AJ315645.1_Maehrenthalia_agilis_partial_28S_rRNA_gene_1299",
  "JN009787.1_6159_JN009787.1_Pentacoelum_hispaniense_28S_ribosomal_RNA_gene__partial_sequence_1600",
  "AJ313218.1_79788_AJ313218.1_Protomonotresis_centrophora_partial_28S_rRNA_gene_1268",
  "AJ313214.1_79788_AJ313214.1_Allostoma_pallidum_partial_28S_rRNA_gene_1252",
  "AJ313230.1_1312376_AJ313230.1_Urastoma_cyprinae_partial_28S_rRNA_gene_1165"
)

platy_28S_reduced <- ape::drop.tip(platy_28S_raw, tips_to_drop)

# root on most basal Catenulidae tip
cat_tips   <- platy_meta_28S %>% filter(family == "Catenulidae") %>% pull(label)
cat_dists  <- cophenetic(platy_28S_reduced)[cat_tips, ]
most_basal <- names(which.max(rowMeans(cat_dists)))

platy_28S_tree_rooted <- prepare_tree(platy_28S_reduced, most_basal, build_label_map(platy_meta_28S))

platy_clade_nodes_28S <- get_clade_nodes(platy_meta_28S, platy_28S_tree_rooted, group_var = "clade")
platy_node_data_28S   <- build_node_data(platy_28S_tree_rooted, platy_clade_nodes_28S, platy_meta_28S)
platy_28S_plot        <- plot_tree(platy_28S_tree_rooted, platy_node_data_28S, platy_clade_nodes_28S)

platy_28S_plot
```

# Annelida COI
```{r ane_COI}
ane_blast_COI <- load_blast("Annelida", "COI")

ane_meta_COI <- build_meta("../../../trees/Annelida_COI/Annelida_COI_custom/Annelida_COI_custom_metadata.csv",
                            ane_blast_COI)

ane_COI_raw <- ggtree::read.tree("../../../trees/Annelida_COI/Annelida_COI_custom/iqtree/custom_Annelida_COI.treefile")

ane_COI_tree_rooted <- prepare_tree(
  ane_COI_raw,
  outgroup     = "PV442811.1_42113_PV442811.1_Aeolosomatidae_sp._Biologic_POLY003_voucher_BMR05135_cytochrome_c_oxidase_subunit_I__COX1__gene__partial_cds__mitochondrial_658",
  label_map    = build_label_map(ane_meta_COI)
)

ane_clade_nodes_COI <- get_clade_nodes(ane_meta_COI, ane_COI_tree_rooted, group_var = "order")
ane_node_data_COI   <- build_node_data(ane_COI_tree_rooted, ane_clade_nodes_COI, ane_meta_COI)
ane_COI_plot        <- plot_tree(ane_COI_tree_rooted, ane_node_data_COI, ane_clade_nodes_COI)

ane_COI_plot
```

# Combined figure
```{r patchwork}
patch_trees <- nem_18S_plot + platy_28S_plot + ane_COI_plot +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

patch_trees

ggsave(
  plot     = patch_trees,
  filename = "plots/trees/patchwork_tree.pdf",
  height   = 8,
  width    = 11
)
```
